subject: Workshop on Illuminating Stories through Photography, Cinematography, and Fujifilm Magic
bodyHtml:
Dear Students, Faculty, and Staff,
The BAJMC Program, SLSE Department, is excited to organize an enriching workshop titled Illuminating Stories through Photography, Cinematography, and Fujifilm Magic on Friday, 10th April 2026, from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM at NUV Auditorium, 5th Floor Block-A
Led by Mr. Shadab Alam Mansoori, Senior Product Evangelist at Fujifilm India Pvt Ltd, this session will dive into professional photography, cinematography, and the innovative magic of Fujifilm's cutting-edge cameras and instant photography tools. As a passionate Fujifilm advocate, artist, photographer, educator, and traveller, Shadab is dedicated to empowering participants through product evangelism, content creation, and imaging expertise—helping you unlock the full potential of Fujifilm's diverse portfolio.
Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your skills in visual storytelling. Kindly mark your calendars and spread the word.

Warm regards.
Communication Cell
Navrachana University
Vasna Bhayli Road | Vadodara 391410
Ph:91-265-2617100 |
Email: communication@nuv.ac.in| Visit our Website
